reviews.review_description: Could be better controls on the oculus controler are a bit dodge but their are options so you can use head tracking but controls need work.
Glitchy at first then I got over that.......  it was not glitchy... it was me not using it correctly ! Superb game, download it now and ENJOY
I didn't like it. Controls felt clunky, no online play, grafix were bad and it was boring with no story line.
A very fun game. Good enough graphics.  However the controls are very bad. Not very responsive. If they had a good controls then this would be great. I would raise this to 5 stars
Please don't buy this game. It's absolutely trash and its not worth the space it takes on your device. Horrible game play, bad controls, and lots of bugs
Had a distorted noise coming through with no way to turn off sound.galaxy s7 edge

developer_response.body:
That is a known bug coming up with some Galaxy devices, nothing to do with our game. In Samsung S7, one possible solution is: Plug your ear buds -> Go to Settings - Sounds and Vibration - Sound quality and effects -> Turn on "UHQ upscaler" and turn it off again. In addition, it is recommended to uninstall the app ACR (Another Call Recorder) if you have it installed. 
Please, tell us if this works for you :)

reviews.review_description: It's a lot of fun. My only complaint is, no option for online multi-player. If they would add this, I would consider it a 5☆

I was about to give this a low score, because I wasn't a fan of the head tracking controls and the auto firing, but when I went to the store page, I noticed it supported gamepads, and after trying it out with a bluetooth controller, I enjoyed the game much more than I did previously.

Would be amazing with online multiplayer, and the menus had some bugs, like I had to restart the game a few times to get my control settings correct, but the gameplay itself is brilliant.

reviews.review_title: Not what it says on the tin
reviews.review_description: Bought this for multiplayer,let's get it out of the way,THERE'S NO MULTIPLAYER !.Having said that it's a shame there's none because the game is really enjoyable.I have had hours of fun playing this in solo mode .but it could be awesome with a team of friends such a pity.

Fun game, has unlockable tanks, skins and achievements.  Multiple maps, variable AI difficulty.
Good bang for your buck with one downside, no online multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: Great game, will definitely play more
reviews.review_description:
This is a fun game - controls were very easy and game did not make me feel sick at all. Obviously as everyone has said, no online multiplayer stinks, since none of my friends have gear vr. I hope everyone understands though, that having online multiplayer means having a server to handle and maintain, which costs money. Im sure it has nothing to do with programming effort. That said, overflight costs about the same and they managed to have online multiplayer. 
In any case, i still had fun playing the AI. Havent even checked out maps yet or unlocked anything. Have to say i was a bit confused at first with capture the flag. I had the opponents flag and it wouldnt drop at our base. Wish it had been explained somewhere that you have to have both flags in possession to score. All in all, happy with the purchase and will come back and play more (which is something i cant say for two other $10 games i bought)

reviews.review_title: Great game but needs Online Multiplayer
reviews.review_description:
Great game but needs Online Multiplayer......Works great on my Oculus Go but with this type of game 'capture the flag' & 'death match' it's purely fundamental that it has online multiplayer? If this was incorporated this game would be a massive hit, as the graphics are good, the sound effects are also great and game play is smooth and addictive.
Another idea...... daily, weekly or monthly achievements to gain extra tanks or skins would work well and vastly increase the longevity. All in all a great game, well worth buying especially now it's in the sale...... Absolute bargain!
